title: Agents
selectCompany: Select a company to view agents.
createFirst: Create your first agent to get started.
detail.confirmTerminate: Are you sure you want to terminate this agent? This action cannot be undone.
detail.confirmPause: Are you sure you want to pause this agent?
config.name: Display name for this agent.
config.title: Job title shown in the org chart.
config.role: Organizational role. Determines position and capabilities.
config.reportsTo: The agent this one reports to in the org hierarchy.
config.capabilities: Describes what this agent can do. Shown in the org chart and used for task routing.
config.adapterType: How this agent runs: local CLI (Claude/Codex/OpenCode), OpenClaw Gateway, spawned process, or generic HTTP webhook.
config.cwd: Default working directory fallback for local adapters. Use an absolute path on the machine running Paperclip.
config.promptTemplate: The prompt sent to the agent on each heartbeat. Supports {{ agent.id }}, {{ agent.name }}, {{ agent.role }} variables.
config.model: Override the default model used by the adapter.
config.thinkingEffort: Control model reasoning depth. Supported values vary by adapter/model.
config.chrome: Enable Claude's Chrome integration by passing --chrome.
config.dangerouslySkipPermissions: Run Claude without permission prompts. Required for unattended operation.
config.dangerouslyBypassSandbox: Run Codex without sandbox restrictions. Required for filesystem/network access.
config.search: Enable Codex web search capability during runs.
config.workspaceStrategy: How Paperclip should realize an execution workspace for this agent.
config.workspaceBaseRef: Base git ref used when creating a worktree branch.
config.worktreeParentDir: Directory where derived worktrees should be created.
config.maxTurnsPerRun: Maximum number of agentic turns (tool calls) per heartbeat run.
config.command: The command to execute (e.g. node, python).
config.localCommand: Override the path to the CLI command.
config.extraArgs: Extra CLI arguments for local adapters, comma-separated.
config.envVars: Environment variables injected into the adapter process.
config.bootstrapPrompt: Optional prompt prepended on the first run.
config.payloadTemplateJson: Optional JSON merged into remote adapter request payloads.
config.webhookUrl: The URL that receives POST requests when the agent is invoked.
config.heartbeatInterval: Run this agent automatically on a timer.
config.timeoutSec: Maximum seconds a run can take before being terminated. 0 means no timeout.
config.graceSec: Seconds to wait after sending interrupt before force-killing the process.
config.wakeOnDemand: Allow this agent to be woken by assignments, API calls, UI actions, or automated systems.
config.cooldownSec: Minimum seconds between consecutive heartbeat runs.
config.maxConcurrentRuns: Maximum number of heartbeat runs that can execute simultaneously.
config.budgetMonthlyCents: Monthly spending limit in cents. 0 means no limit.
config.instructionsFileHint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior.
config.browserSecurityNote: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.
config.pathInstructions.macOSStep4: Paste the result into the path input.
config.pathInstructions.windowsStep1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
config.pathInstructions.windowsStep4: Paste the result into the path input.
config.pathInstructions.terminalStep3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.
